description: Parser and rewriter tests. Each case provides raw equation text and asserts what the rewriter produces. Used by tests/run_quantum_corpus.py.

cases.name: commutator_heisenberg_ocr
cases.notes: OCR form: division bar dropped from Leibniz notation. Relies on OCR fallback in _rewrite_leibniz_derivatives.

cases.name: schrodinger_td_unicode
cases.notes: Time-dependent Schrödinger. Exercises first- and second-order partial derivatives from Unicode partial-derivative notation.

cases.name: shm_leibniz
cases.notes: Simple harmonic motion in Leibniz notation with explicit second-order operator.

cases.name: integral_with_rhs
cases.notes: Separator between integrand and dx survives implicit-multiplication pass that rewrites ') d' to ')*d'.
